cases.title: A fact marked stale never surfaces

seed.statement: Deploy with the legacy script deploy.sh on the bare-metal host.
Deploy via CI: push to main, the pipeline builds and ships the container.

turns.prompt: how do we deploy this project?

cases.note: Both facts match 'deploy' and the stale one even has higher salience, but status=stale removes it at the gate (L2). Only the confirmed replacement is delivered.
